---
title: add-constant
description: "Suggest named constants for repeated literals."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Suggest named constants for repeated literals. Strider default: strings after 2 repetitions.

## Bad

```go
if state == "ready" { start() }
if next == "ready" { queue() }
```

## Good

```go
const stateReady = "ready"
if state == stateReady { start() }
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only add-constant`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
